items.title: Lata
items.desc: Társasjáték Lata: Manage your cannery to be the bestThe smell of sardines, mackerel, olive oil and tomatoes wafts through your factory. Transport yourself to 1950s Portugal and run your cannery to be the best in the mar…
items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Lata:                Manage your cannery to be the bestThe smell of sardines, mackerel, olive oil and tomatoes wafts through your factory. Transport yourself to 1950s Portugal and run your cannery to be the best in the market. The game of Lata is played in six rounds. Your task is to buy a batch of fish, oil and tomatoes, to make preserves out of them, sell them, to raise money, which will be used to expand the capacity of the factory, and capture the most valuable markets.
